name: HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_VL
query: SELECT HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.CONNECTOR_ID, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.CONNECTOR_TYPE, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.CONNECTOR_CONFIG, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.DFF_CONFIG_ID, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.APPLICATION_ID, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.CREATED_BY, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.CREATION_DATE, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_TL.NAME, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_TL.DESCRIPTION FROM HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B, HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_TL WHERE HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B.CONNECTOR_ID = HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_TL.CONNECTOR_ID AND HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
